name: Stir-Fried Pork with Kimchee (the Frugal Gour
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Pork butt, sliced into 1/8-inch thick pieces
Salt & fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok with peanut oil over medium heat.
2. Add the pork slices and stir-fry for a couple of minutes until browned. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Add scallions and toss briefly.
4. Stir in Napa Kimchee, garlic, and red pepper flakes. Continue to stir-fry for another couple of minutes until all ingredients are heated through.
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving plate. Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds before serving.
Note: Be careful with additional salt as the kimchee is already salty.
